Release notes for PebbleOS v1.8.1 and v1.8.2, detailing new features and bug fixes for the Pebble SmartWatch.

# Purpose
The release notes document the updates and bug fixes for PebbleOS versions 1.8 and 1.8.1 for the Pebble SmartWatch. The updates include improvements such as enhanced backlight control, which is now configurable and includes an "AUTO" option that uses the ambient light sensor. Display settings are now retained after resets, and notification popups have a timeout of three minutes. The release also introduces persistent debug logs to aid in support cases, with data retrieval only occurring if the user submits a support case. Bug fixes address issues such as airplane mode causing resets, crashes from certain messages, progress bar resets during updates, and battery state inaccuracies. The subsequent update, PebbleOS v1.8.2, specifically addresses erratic behavior in the automatic backlight setting introduced in the previous version.
